caption: The video features a presentation slide titled "Our Experience," which highlights the benefits of a particular software solution for both developers and DevOps teams. The presenter, standing on the left side of the screen, explains the advantages under two main categories: "Dev win" and "DevOps win." For developers, the slide emphasizes the convenience of using a single library for integration, eliminating the need for separate libraries for sending events and collecting performance counters, along with a consistent interface. For DevOps, it underscores the ability to change underlying components without developer support, the super light-weight nature of the solution (replacing five Logstash Medium instances with one Hekad medium instance and maintaining CPU utilization below 5%), and the implementation of a single data pipeline for all data. The Exotel logo is visible at the bottom left corner, indicating the company behind this technology.
